free_text: Spectra of the protons, deuterons and tritons produced
by 50 MeV alpha particles from Al-27 and Co-59.
Scattered particles were detected by dE-E
detector consisting of two counters. Semiconductor
Si(Li) diffusion-drift counter with the thickness of
8 mm was used as E detector and ionization chamber
Angular and power distributions were averaged over the
interval of 1 MeV. No explanation of relative units is
The thickness of aluminum foils was 2.9 mg/cm2.
